## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction steps

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- Python version: [e.g. 3.10]
- PyTorch version: [e.g. 2.1.0]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Cambium version: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
